creator: nagy.attila@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Somebody should commit this:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/153295
see the latest patch...

On 01/15/2011 11:06 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/dovecot2-pigeonhole,
>
> Please note that PR ports/154038 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/154038
>
